title: Ancient Chinese Records Shows Jesus is God 4524 Before Christ!  New Discovery
author: Nate
contentText:
Ancient Chinese Records Shows Jesus is God 4524 Before Christ!  New Discovery

#chinese #jesus #christianity 
Ancient Chinese people worshipped Our Monotheistic Triune God of Scriptures! This shows How Merciful and Loving God is that he revealed himself to them at least 2,500 years before Christ was in the flesh before us. The Ancient Manuscripts show Jesus is apart of the Triune God revealed in the Old Testament and this is the same faith followed by the Ancient Chinese before Buddhism. It is quite interesting because in China they claim Christians are "leaving tradition" when in fact these ancient manuscripts show they are more traditional by being Christian.
